title: 背伸びから始まること

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: All right. Let's head back.
choice_data_list: Anywhere you want to stop on the way?
Anywhere you want to stop on the way?

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: Umm...

text_block_list.name: Umamusume A
text_block_list.text: Hey, Jordan! We're all chilling. Wanna come with?

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: Ah, hold up.

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: ...Wait, I think I gotta pass. Next time!

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: Meh. I'm just not feeling it.

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
Ooh, check out that poster! "New burger on the
menu." I've gotta try th—

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: Ah! No, no, no. I can't... Never mind.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Grrrowl...

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: ...Geez.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Tosen Jordan is acting strange... For the moment,
we decide to head over to the hamburger place
for a bite to eat.

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
Let's see... Where's the new burger... Ah, here it
is. And how many calories...

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: Whaaat?! Over eight hundred?! That's insane!

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: Sigh... I'll have the salad. After all, this is the age of... uh, reduced calories!

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: ...Yum. Well, let's head back already.

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text: Ohhh! And what should appear before me but just the thing I really need to kick around?!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
Care for a game of soccer? Or how about sepak
takraw? Or perhaps a bit of da cau?

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
Ugh... So annoying! Like always, I have no idea
what you're saying! But, well...

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: ...Never mind. Let's just go.

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text: What's got her goat? Did an alien give her a brain transplant or something?

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
Right, let's head back for real this time. Seriously,
let's go. Gotta rest up... Gotta rest...

text_block_list.name: Japanese Restaurant Staff
text_block_list.text: Come try our very popular full-course menu!

text_block_list.name: Cosmetics Store Staff
text_block_list.text:
Our most popular items—recently featured in
major magazines—are now available in a new
range of colors!

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: Argh!

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
I wanna eat Japanese food! I wanna check out the
cosmetics! I wanna hang out with my friends more!

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: I tried so hard today! I held back as best I could!

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: Because I've been so cringe!

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: All those times!

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
Like that time you said we should go home
because I was tired...

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
And when you said we should go to the inn
another time...

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
That was all 'cause you were trying to, like,
manage my schedule, right? All for my sake...

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
You do so much for me, and I don't do anything...
It's so cringe it hurts!

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
But... I can't do it. I'm drained. It's too hard. I just
can't do things like this.
choice_data_list:
When you feel that way, it's okay to turn to me
for help.

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: ...Huh? Wh-what are you talking about?

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
Are you... really serious? But isn't that a huge
pain? I mean... I feel like I'm ready to explode just
from today.

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
You're really saying it's okay? I'm probably gonna
be super extra, you know?

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: ...Pfft!

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: Ahaha! What was that? You're way too into this!

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
But okay. In that case, it's fine by me too. I'm
gonna master my management skills, just like you.

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: So anyway, with that out of the way...

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
Potatoes are vegetables, right? So, like, fries
don't have any calories?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The road ahead is long, but I make up my mind to
keep supporting her until she can fend for herself.

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: Hey, what happened to all that hype?!

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: Uuugh! Quit it! Don't mess around like that!

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
Otherwise, you better believe I'm gonna, like...
make things really hard for you!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Her determination to never back down is her
greatest strength. As long as she has that, she'll
definitely be able to achieve her goals.

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: Ohhh... Is that based on actual experience?

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: Heh... Come on, spill it. Sounds pretty interesting.

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
Oh, tell me about your biggest failure! I wanna
hear all about your mistakes!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
As we make our way back to the academy, I
regale her with some stories from my days as a
student.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
By sharing my stories, I feel like I've gotten a little
bit closer to Tosen Jordan.
